name: bevy
description: Skills for building games and interactive applications with the Bevy ECS game engine in Rust

interface.shortDescription: Build Rust games and interactive apps with Bevy
interface.longDescription: Skills for Bevy ECS, project setup, rendering, physics, input and interaction, UI, audio, and ecosystem choices for Rust games and interactive applications.
defaultPrompt: Help me build or structure a Bevy game.
